subject: SpaceX IPO Insider — Week of 2026-04-03
newsletter_html:
SpaceX IPO Insider

🚀

Weekly IPO Tracker Report

SpaceX IPO Week of 2026-04-03

Welcome to this week's SpaceX IPO Insider report. Below are the latest developments in SpaceX's journey toward going public.

📰 Top Headlines

Can You Invest in SpaceX in 2026? Details & Alternatives | The Motley Fool

In February 2026, it was announced that SpaceX would acquire Musk's artificial intelligence startup, xAI, which was launched in 2023. xAI was valued at around $230 billion in a recent round of funding.

Read more →

SpaceX files for IPO, sources say, offering investors stake in Musk's space ambitions | Reuters

"Starlink is the only reason this valuation is defensible," Boloor said. "This is going to be the recurring revenue engine" with 9 million subscribers, defense contracts and ​its own data network. SpaceX did not immediately respond to a Reuters request for comment. The Starbase, Texas-headquartered firm could seek to raise more than $50 billion in the IPO, handily surpassing the 2019 flotation of Saudi Aramco, which remains the largest IPO on record.

Read more →

SpaceX targets more than $2 trillion valuation in IPO, Bloomberg News reports | Reuters

The SpaceX’s logo is seen in one of their buildings as the initial public offering (IPO) is expected to be announced soon in Starbase, Texas, U.S. March 31, 2026. REUTERS/Gabriel V. Cardenas Purchase Licensing Rights, opens new tab · An earlier ...

Read more →

SpaceX IPO 2026: Musk targets $1.75T in Record Public Debut

SpaceX IPO 2026 aims for a $1.75T valuation as Starlink hits 10M users and the xAI merger turns satellites into orbital AI infrastructure.

Read more →

SpaceX Goes Public, Musk Files for World’s Largest IPO with June 2026 Target - TechStory

SpaceX targets the world’s largest IPO in June 2026. Elon Musk officially files to take the aerospace giant public.

Read more →

Current Valuation

~$350B

Based on latest secondary market transactions and investor rounds.

Key Angle

SpaceX valuation growth signals investor confidence ahead of IPO

IPO Timeline

SpaceX is expected to go public in Q4 2026. Starlink IPO expected to precede SpaceX by 6-12 months. SEC filing anticipated Q2-Q3 2026.
